walnut-pie-with-dark-semolina-argiro.name: Walnut Pie With Dark Semolina
instructions: Beat the eggs with sugar until fluffy and puff well.
In a bowl, mix the soft flour, semolina, baking powder, salt, vanilla and cocoa.
We grind the nuts in the blender.
Gradually add the solid materials to the egg mixture and gently incorporate them with spatula, making folding movements to avoid loss of volume.
Finally, add the ground nuts and the seed oil and mix gently until the mixture is homogenized.
Pour the mixture into a buttered baking pan and baking in a preheated oven at 170°C, in the air, in the medium grill, for about 40 minutes.
Allow the sweet to cool well.
Boil the ingredients for the syrup for 4–5 minutes and let it become lukewarm.
Cut the cold sweet and syrup, gradually pouring the syrup.
Allow it to be absorbed and cool completely before serving.

watermelon-lime-and-tequila-frozen-cockt.name: Watermelon, Lime, And Tequila Frozen Cocktail

ingredients.prep: with seeds; plus sliced jalapeño for serving (optional)

instructions: Purée watermelon, tequila, simple syrup, lime juice, ½”-thick jalapeño slice, and 3 cups ice in a blender until smooth and very thick (mixture will loosen immediately once poured). Divide among glasses and garnish with watermelon wedges and jalapeño slices, if desired.

watermelon-berry-salad-with-chile-dressi.name: Watermelon-berry Salad With Chile Dressing And Lots Of Herbs

ingredients.item: Finely chopped palm sugar or coconut sugar

ingredients.prep: peeled and roughly sliced against the grain
such as Fresno or ripe red jalapeño, stemmed and roughly chopped

ingredients.item: Big handfuls very lightly packed mixed herbs
ingredients.prep: such as mint leaves, Thai or Italian basil leaves, and small cilantro sprigs

instructions: Combine all the dressing ingredients in a blender and blend on high speed until smooth, about 2 minutes. It keeps in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days. Shake well before using.
Cut the watermelon into 3 x 1 x 1-inch sticks, flicking out seeds as you go. You will have about 6 cups. Chill the watermelon in the fridge for at least an hour.

Combine the chilled watermelon and onion in a large mixing bowl and season all over with the flaky salt. Add the berries, lemongrass, and dressing, then toss gently but well. Drizzle on the olive oil, add the herbs, and gently toss once more. Transfer to a platter to serve.

whipped-feta-dip-with-marinated-tomatoes.name: Whipped Feta Dip With Marinated Tomatoes

ingredients.item: Container simple truth™ organic grape tomatoes
Simple truth™ organic whole milk greek yogurt
Simple truth™ organic red pepper flakes
Simple truth™ sea salt pita crisps

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230°C). Line a baking sheet with foil.
Spread the Simple Truth™ Grape Tomatoes on the prepared baking sheet and toss with the olive oil and 1 teaspoon salt.
Roast the tomatoes for 15–18 minutes, or until lightly charred and softened.

While tomatoes roast, make the whipped feta dip: In a blender or food processor, combine the feta, garlic, sour cream, Greek yogurt, Simple Truth™ Organic Lemon zest and juice, dill, oregano, and remaining teaspoon of salt. Puree until smooth.

Spread the whipped feta dip in a shallow bowl. Pile the roasted tomatoes in the center, drizzling over any extra olive oil from roasting. Garnish with a few sprigs of dill, the sesame seeds, and red pepper flakes. Serve with Simple Truth™ Sea Salt Pita Crisps for dipping.
Enjoy!

white-beans-argiro.name: White Beans
instructions: We don't have to soak the beans before.
Finely chop the dried onions, carrots in small frame pieces, fresh onions and saddlery.
Rub the potato in a thick grater.
Put the beans in a pot
Add a lot of cold water to cover them and let them boil over medium heat for 35-40 minutes, even half softened.
Drain in a colander.
Add 3 tablespoons of olive oil (from total), into a deep pot and add the dried onions, carrots and celery.
Mix well, oil them.
Set them for 2 to 3 minutes in medium heat to sauce.
Add the half-boiled beans and add boiling water to cover the ingredients and highlight 4 to 5 cm of their surface.
Add the grated potato.
Cover the pot and simmer for 30 to 35 minutes until the beans soften.
Then add salt and pepper and if we want some bumblebee.
Add the dill, finely chopped greens, celery and fresh onions.

Finally, add the remaining olive oil, on the one hand because it is healthier (the olive oil keeps all its aromas and nutrients) and more delicious, on the other because this is a way to soften the legumes.
Allow the bean to boil for another few minutes, stirring sometimes until the beans are well grown and their broth looks like dense sauce.
Add the lemon at the end and check the salt and pepper.

white-beans-with-squid-arugula-and-cherr.name: White Beans With Squid, Arugula, And Cherry Tomatoes

ingredients.item: Cooked white beans (see cannellini beans with garlic and sage)

instructions: Steam squid bodies and tentacles until tender, about 3 minutes. Transfer to plate and cool to lukewarm.

Cut squid bodies into 1/2-inch-wide rings. Cut squid tentacles in half if large. Transfer squid to large bowl. Add baby arugula, cherry tomatoes, beans, olive oil, and 2 tablespoons lemon juice. Toss gently to blend, adding more lemon juice, if desired. Season with salt and pepper.

white-chocolate-key-lime-cheesecake.name: White Chocolate Key Lime Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Lightly grease the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Sprinkle graham cracker crumbs into the bottom of the prepared pan.
Beat cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, allowing each egg to blend into the cream cheese mixture before adding the next.
Mix white chocolate chips, cream, lime juice, and lime zest together in a stainless steel bowl. Place bowl over a pot of boiling water.

Stir chocolate chips mixture until the chocolate melts completely and the mixture is smooth, about 5 minutes; pour into the cream cheese mixture and stir to combine. Pour the mixture over the graham cracker crumbs in the prepared springform pan.
Bake in preheated oven the cake's center is set, about 75 minutes. Cool at room temperature for 15 minutes before refrigerating to chill completely, at least 1 hour.

whole-orange-cake-teleculinaria.name: Whole Orange Cake
instructions: Unte uma forma com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha.
Put the sugar, the butter, the orange, previously washed and cut into pieces, and the eggs in a blender, beat everything very well, then put the yeast and flour together and hit again.
Lay the dough in shape and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 30 to 35 minutes. Deform, cool and serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

wholemeal-bread-in-5-without-yeast-argir.name: Wholemeal Bread In 5' Without Yeast
wholemeal-bread-in-5-without-yeast-argir.original_name: Ψωμί ολικής αλέσεως σε 5′ χωρίς ζύμωμα
instructions: Dissolve salt in sour milk first.
Mix all the solid ingredients in a bowl, add the olive oil and add the sour milk.
Mix the dough with the blade of the knife gently without intense movements.
Gently combine the dough with the hands.
Lay baking paper on sheet.
Sprinkle some oats.
Place on top the dough giving shape round but plate. Not to exceed 3 cm tall.
Place a deep cross on the surface or 2-3 deep engravings.
Sprinkle with some water and sprinkle with oats brides.
Bake in a well preheated ocean at 200oC for 30′, turn over the strawberry and continue baking for an additional 10′.

wild-ricecrusted-halibut.name: Wild Rice–crusted Halibut
instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Add rice and cook, tossing occasionally, until grains have popped open like popcorn and are lightly browned, about 2 minutes. Transfer to paper towels and let cool. Pulse in a food processor or blender to a fine powder.

Preheat oven to 350°. Place flour in a shallow bowl. Beat eggs and 1 Tbsp. water in another shallow bowl. Place wild rice powder in a baking dish. Season fish with salt and pepper. Working with 1 fillet at a time, dredge in flour, shaking off excess, then dip into egg mixture, turning to coat evenly. Coat with rice powder, pressing gently to adhere.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large ovenproof nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook fish until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer skillet to oven and roast fish until just opaque throughout, about 3 minutes. Serve with lemon wedges.
Do Ahead: Wild rice powder can be made 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

wine-octopus-in-the-pot-argiro.name: Wine Octopus In The Pot

ingredients.item: 10 medium dry red onions engraved at 4 (not up to below)
10 medium dry red onions engraved at 4 (not up to below)

instructions: Heat the oil in a pot and add the onions. Leave them on low heat for about 30 minutes, until they soften well and start to melt.
Sprinkle with the sugar and mix.
Add the octopus and leave for a few minutes until it changes color.
Add the liquids and herbs and let the food simmer over medium heat until the octopus softens.
As it lowers several zooms, as soon as it softens well, turn the heat on and boil for a few minutes, until the sauce thickens and thickens.
Add the honey and pepper, mix well and withdraw from the heat.
Serve the octopus with the tied sauce, accompanied with chopped potatoes.
